title: PasswordCredential
description: Represents a password credential (client secret) associated with an application or service principal

displayName.description: Friendly name for the password credential

hint.description: Contains the first three characters of the password (returned on read operations)

secretText.description: The generated password value. Only returned at creation time and cannot be retrieved later.

startDateTime.description: The date and time at which the password becomes valid

endDateTime.description: The date and time at which the password expires. Maximum lifetime varies by policy.
